iterations.title: Blog System Database Migration
iterations.description: Migrate static blog pages to database-driven dynamic rendering. Currently 9 articles are hardcoded as .tsx files.

iterations.title: Case Studies Dynamic Rendering
iterations.description: Move case studies from hardcoded constants to database. Need case_studies table with results as JSON.

iterations.title: Performance Optimization Bundle
iterations.description: Address Core Web Vitals and loading performance. Bundle size reduction and image optimization.

iterations.title: Search Functionality Implementation
iterations.description: Add full-text search across blog articles and case studies.

iterations.title: Content Management Dashboard
iterations.description: Create admin interface for managing blog articles without code changes.

iterations.title: Content Monitoring System Enhancement
iterations.description: Improve Python content monitor with error handling and auto-publishing.

iterations.title: Analytics Dashboard v2
iterations.description: Build comprehensive analytics dashboard with AI visibility metrics.

iterations.title: Newsletter Subscription System
iterations.description: Build email newsletter for blog subscribers with automated digests.

iterations.title: A/B Testing Framework
iterations.description: Implement A/B testing for landing pages and CTAs.

iterations.title: Mobile App PWA Features
iterations.description: Enhance PWA capabilities for offline reading and push notifications.
